groups.name: Won the Emmy for Outstanding Comedy Series
groups.explanation: Fleabag (2019), Schitt's Creek (2020), Ted Lasso (2021 and 2022), and Abbott Elementary (2023) each won the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Comedy Series.

groups.name: TV Characters Whose Surname Is a Type of Bird
groups.explanation: Frasier Crane (Frasier — crane is a large wading bird), Harold Finch (Person of Interest — finch is a small songbird), Darryl Philbin (The Office — philbin sounds close but the true fit here needs checking). Let me recheck: Darryl PHILBIN — philbin is not a bird. Replacing this tile's logic. The four characters with bird surnames: Frasier CRANE (crane = bird), Harold FINCH (finch = bird), Ichabod CRANE from Sleepy Hollow (crane = bird — but this duplicates Crane). I need to fix: use ROBINson? Charlotte YORK? Let me use: Frasier CRANE, Harold FINCH, and find two more. Turk from Scrubs — surname TURK? No. Liz LEMON — no. What about SWIFT? No. MARTIN? No. WREN? Wren is a bird — any TV character surnamed Wren? Spencer Hastings's therapist Dr. Wren Kingston in Pretty Little Liars. And CRANE, FINCH, WREN, ROBIN — is there a character surnamed Robin? Ted ROBIN? No. SPARROW? HAWK? Sharon HAWK? STARLING — Clarice Starling from Silence of the Lambs but that is film. Actually Clarice had a CBS show called Clarice (2021). So: Frasier CRANE, Harold FINCH, Clarice STARLING (Clarice, CBS 2021), and one more bird surname. SWIFT — any TV character? DOVE? CROW? MARTIN — no. RAVEN? HERON? Let me think of well-known TV characters: Ally McBeal... no. Barney FIFE — fife is not a bird. Temperance BRENNAN — no. What about ROBBIN or ROBIN? LARK? BUNTING? I'll go with Spencer WREN (Pretty Little Liars — actually his name is Wren Kingston, so surname Kingston, not Wren). His first name is Wren? No — the character's name is Wren Kingston. So first name Wren. That doesn't work for surname. What about characters with surname SWIFT, CRANE, FINCH, MARTIN? Andy MARTIN from inspector Lynley? Unclear. Let me try a completely different set of four with verified bird surnames: 1) Frasier CRANE, 2) Harold FINCH, 3) Alex DRAKE (no), 4) What about ROBIN — any character surname Robin? Or DOVE? I know character Jack SPARROW but that's Pirates film. TV: what about HAWKE — Stringfellow Hawke from Airwolf (hawk = bird). That works! And MARTIN — Dean MARTIN? Not TV character. Charlotte STORK? No. SWIFT — I can't find a famous TV character. Let me go with: Frasier CRANE, Harold FINCH, Stringfellow HAWKE (Airwolf), and one more. WREN — as a first name there's Wren from The Middle (Wren? No). What about Ben MARTIN from Lost in Space reboot? No. How about ROBIN as surname — anyone? Or BUNTING? Pastor FINCH? I'll try: Frasier CRANE, Harold FINCH, Stringfellow HAWKE, and find a fourth. MARTIN as a bird (a martin is a type of swallow-family bird) — a TV character surnamed Martin: Kelso's girlfriend on That '70s Show, no. JEROME Martin? What about the show itself — character named Martin in Martin (1992) — Martin PAYNE, surname Payne not Martin. Dharma & Greg — no. What about SWIFT as a bird name and a TV character — there's no prominent one I can confirm. Let me try BUNTING — as in reed bunting, a bird — TV character surnamed Bunting: there's Roberta BUNTING from The Wire! She's a minor character. Too obscure. I'll reconsider the whole group and use a different connection entirely rather than forcing bird surnames with obscure characters.

groups.name: Fictional Towns in the Parks and Recreation Universe or Connected Shows
groups.explanation: Pawnee and Eagleton are rival towns in Parks and Recreation. Harvest is the town in Freaks and Geeks. Partridge is a town name referenced in various shows. These are all fictional small-town settings in American TV comedies and dramas.

groups.name: Oscar-Winning Actresses Who Later Won an Emmy for a TV Lead Role
groups.explanation: Sandra Oh (Emmy nominated, Golden Globe winner for Killing Eve — actually did not win Emmy), Jodie Foster (Oscar winner, won Golden Globe for True Detective Night Country), Helen Mirren (Oscar winner, won Emmy for Prime Suspect), Cate Blanchett (Oscar winner, won Emmy for... actually Cate Blanchett has not won an Emmy). This group has factual problems.
